metadata.title: Critical Minerals Geopolitical Network — Pax-Silica v4
key_updates: ASEAN bloc node (AMCAP-IV 2026-2030; 47% global nickel share)
FORGE bloc (Feb 4 2026; 55 nations; replaces MSP; price floors vs China)
Pilbara Minerals ecosystem: Ganfeng 310kt/yr + Chengxin 150kt/yr + Yahua 160kt/yr
CATL exited Pilbara equity Mar 2023 (A$601M); indirect supply via converters
Solar/polysilicon cluster: Tongwei, GCL, Daqo, LONGi, Jinko, First Solar, Wacker
Recycling loop: Redwood Materials, Umicore, Huayou Recycling, GEM
9 person nodes: Robin Zeng, JB Straubel, Robert Friedland, Manny Zamora, Jiang Weiping, Yuan Jiabin, Gary Nagle, Li Liangbin, Dante Bravo
Financial weights on all edges (0-10 scale; notes field has USD/volume data)

nodes.label: United States
nodes.notes: Leads FORGE (Feb 2026); DoD/DoE critical minerals investment; entity list vs China

nodes.label: China
nodes.notes: Dominant in REE processing (85%), cobalt (73%), graphite (100%); June 2026 export controls on MP Materials, USA Rare Earth

nodes.label: Australia
nodes.notes: QUAD member; FORGE member; FIRB restricts Chinese acquisition of critical mineral assets

nodes.label: Philippines
nodes.notes: 2nd largest global nickel producer; ASEAN member; FNI, SR Metals, Marcventures

nodes.label: Indonesia
nodes.notes: Largest global nickel producer; HPAL investment hub; nickel quota policy constraining supply

nodes.label: DRC
nodes.notes: 60% global cobalt; Kamoa-Kakula; ARECOMS 96,600t annual cobalt cap 2026

nodes.label: Chile
nodes.notes: World's largest lithium reserves; Atacama; SQM-Codelco Nova Andino Litio JV Dec 2025

nodes.label: Canada
nodes.notes: G7 member; FORGE; Ivanhoe Mines HQ

nodes.label: Japan
nodes.notes: QUAD + FORGE + G7; US-Japan-EU joint critical minerals Action Plans

nodes.label: India
nodes.notes: QUAD + FORGE; emerging critical minerals player

nodes.label: European Union
nodes.notes: EU CRMA 2024; FORGE member; US-Japan-EU Action Plans

nodes.label: Vietnam
nodes.notes: 2nd largest bismuth & tungsten producer; ASEAN member

nodes.label: Malaysia
nodes.notes: Lynas RE processing hub; ASEAN minerals leader in Al/Mn; US-Malaysia critical minerals MOU 2026

nodes.label: Bolivia
nodes.notes: World's largest known Li reserves (Uyuni); YLB state firm; limited extraction to date

nodes.label: Argentina
nodes.notes: Lithium Triangle; SQM, Lithium Americas; Pastos Grandes

nodes.label: Myanmar
nodes.notes: Major rare earth supplier to China; 50% global heavy REE; post-coup political instability

nodes.label: South Korea
nodes.notes: Chairs FORGE until June 2026; POSCO Pilbara lithium deal; K-battery supply chain

nodes.label: G7
nodes.notes: G7 Critical Minerals Action Plan; core FORGE membership

nodes.label: QUAD
nodes.notes: Indo-Pacific minerals security; QUAD minerals corridor (PH-Indonesia)

nodes.label: ASEAN
nodes.notes: ASEAN Minerals Development Vision 2045; AMCAP-IV 2026-2030; 47% global nickel

nodes.label: MP Materials
nodes.notes: Mountain Pass REE; DoD deal Jul 2025: $400M for 15% equity, $110/kg NdPr floor; entity-listed by China Jun 2026

nodes.label: USA Rare Earth
nodes.notes: Round Top REE deposit TX; NdPr + HREE; China entity-listed Jun 2026

nodes.label: Lynas Rare Earths
nodes.notes: Mount Weld mine WA; Malaysia separation plant; largest non-China REE producer

nodes.label: Iluka Resources
nodes.notes: Eneabba REE refinery WA; DoD co-funded; heavy REE focus

nodes.label: Ivanhoe Mines
nodes.notes: Founded by Robert Friedland; Kamoa-Kakula 39.6%; 2025 Cu revenue $3.28B

nodes.label: Freeport-McMoRan
nodes.notes: Grasberg Cu/Au/Ag (49% via PT-FI); 40-50% capacity post-Sep 2025 mudslide; full recovery 2027-28

nodes.label: Glencore
nodes.notes: Mutanda/Katanga cobalt DRC; 2026 cobalt quota 3,925t/qtr (ARECOMS); Viterra merger 2024

nodes.label: Rio Tinto
nodes.notes: Rincon Li project Argentina; Jadar lithium Serbia; iron ore dominant

nodes.label: Pilbara Minerals
nodes.notes: Pilgangoora spodumene WA; CATL exited equity Mar 2023 (A$601M); Ganfeng 310kt/yr offtake

nodes.label: SQM
nodes.notes: Atacama Li/K; Nova Andino Litio JV with Codelco Dec 2025 (state 51%+); Tianqi exiting 21.9% stake

nodes.label: CATL
nodes.notes: World's largest EV battery maker; 37% global market; Robin Zeng founder; exited Pilbara equity 2023; indirect supply via Chengxin/Yahua

nodes.label: Zijin Mining
nodes.notes: Kamoa-Kakula 39.6%; Timok Serbia Cu; Three Gorges Li brine Argentina

nodes.label: Ganfeng Lithium
nodes.notes: World's largest Li chemical producer; Pilbara 310kt/yr offtake; customer of CATL/BYD/Tesla/BMW

nodes.label: Chengxin Lithium
nodes.notes: CATL/BYD/Hyundai tier-1 Li converter; 150kt/yr Pilbara offtake 2025-2026

nodes.label: Sichuan Yahua
nodes.notes: Top Li hydroxide producer; Tesla/LG Energy tier-1; 100-160kt/yr Pilbara offtake 2025-2026

nodes.label: Tianqi Lithium
nodes.notes: Exiting SQM stake (21.9%); Greenbushes mine AUS 51%; Chile Supreme Court rejected appeal 2026

nodes.label: Tsingshan
nodes.notes: World's largest nickel producer; HPAL Indonesia; founder Jiang Weiping; transformed NPI market

nodes.label: CMOC
nodes.notes: Tenke Fungurume + Kisanfu DRC; 2026 cobalt quota 6,650t/qtr; Yuan Jiabin CEO

nodes.label: BYD
nodes.notes: EV + battery maker; Ganfeng/Chengxin Li supply; challenging CATL globally

nodes.label: Shenghe Resources
nodes.notes: MP Materials offtake expired Jan 2026; retains undisclosed equity stake in MP

nodes.label: Huayou Cobalt
nodes.notes: DRC cobalt; Indonesia HPAL; Huayou Recycling arm; Vale partnership

nodes.label: Huayou Recycling
nodes.notes: EV battery recycling; black mass processing; Li/Co/Ni recovery

nodes.label: Global Ferronickel (FNI)
nodes.notes: FY2025 net income +91% to P1.42B; Q1 2026 +170% YoY; Cagdianao deposit Surigao; 100% export to China; Gutierrez family controlled

nodes.label: Nickel Asia Corp (NAC)
nodes.notes: Sold Coral Bay 15.625% stake to SMM Feb 2025 (SMM now 100%); pivoting to upstream + renewables

nodes.label: SR Metals
nodes.notes: Loreto deposit Agusan del Norte; nickel ore; exports to Chinese HPAL plants

nodes.label: Marcventures
nodes.notes: Mindanao nickel operations; Surigao del Sur; family-controlled Philippine mining

nodes.label: Redwood Materials
nodes.notes: Founded by JB Straubel (Tesla co-founder); Li/Co/Ni battery recycling; Nevada + South Carolina plants

nodes.label: Umicore
nodes.notes: EU battery materials + recycling; Co/Ni/Li recovery from spent EV batteries

nodes.label: GEM Co.
nodes.notes: China's largest battery recycling firm; Co/Ni/Li black mass; supplies CATL/BYD

nodes.label: Tongwei
nodes.notes: World's largest polysilicon + solar cell producer; 250,000t/yr polysilicon capacity

nodes.label: GCL Technology
nodes.notes: World's 2nd largest polysilicon producer; Xinjiang + Inner Mongolia plants; US tariff target

nodes.label: Daqo New Energy
nodes.notes: NYSE: DQ; Xinjiang polysilicon; US Uyghur Forced Labor Prevention Act scrutiny

nodes.label: LONGi Green Energy
nodes.notes: World's largest solar module maker; HPBC cell technology; Li Zhenguo co-founder

nodes.label: JinkoSolar
nodes.notes: NYSE: JKS; top 3 global solar module; US + EU markets

nodes.label: First Solar
nodes.notes: Only major US solar manufacturer; Series 7 CdTe thin-film; NASDAQ: FSLR; IRA beneficiary

nodes.label: Wacker Chemie
nodes.notes: Europe's only major polysilicon producer; ~80,000t/yr; Burghausen DE + Charleston SC

nodes.label: Vale
nodes.notes: Vale Base Metals spun off; Sudbury Ni CA; New Caledonia exit; Huayou Indonesia partnership

nodes.label: Sumitomo Metal Mining (SMM)
nodes.notes: 100% Coral Bay HPAL PH (bought NAC 15.625% Feb 2025); Taganito HPAL; key Japan supply chain

nodes.label: Samsung SDI
nodes.notes: K-battery; NMC cells; Stellantis JV; Indiana gigafactory

nodes.label: Codelco
nodes.notes: State copper miner; Nova Andino Litio JV with SQM Dec 2025 (51%+ state); Chile's national champion

nodes.label: Tesla
nodes.notes: Yahua + Ganfeng Li supply; Redwood Materials recycling partner; LFP + NMC cells

nodes.label: Graphite
nodes.notes: China controls ~100% of battery-grade graphite processing

nodes.label: Silicon / Polysilicon
nodes.notes: Solar-grade polysilicon; China 80%+ of global production

nodes.label: Spodumene
nodes.notes: Key Li ore; Pilbara Minerals world's largest producer

nodes.label: Mountain Pass
nodes.notes: Largest US REE mine; MP Materials; NdPr + Ce/La

nodes.label: Pilgangoora
nodes.notes: World's largest spodumene operation; Pilbara Minerals

nodes.label: Atacama Salar
nodes.notes: World's highest-grade Li brine; SQM + Albemarle

nodes.label: Greenbushes
nodes.notes: World's highest-grade spodumene; Talison (Tianqi 51% / Albemarle 49%)

nodes.label: Grasberg
nodes.notes: World's 2nd largest Cu mine; Freeport 49% / PTFI 51%; 40-50% capacity post-Sep 2025 mudslide

nodes.label: Kamoa-Kakula
nodes.notes: World's 3rd largest Cu deposit; 2025: 388kt Cu; 2025 revenue $3.28B; smelter first anode Dec 2025

nodes.label: Tenke Fungurume
nodes.notes: CMOC 80%; high-grade cobalt; ARECOMS quota

nodes.label: Cagdianao
nodes.notes: Global Ferronickel (FNI) Surigao del Norte; limonite ore

nodes.label: Coral Bay HPAL
nodes.notes: Palawan; SMM 100% (after NAC exit Feb 2025); NiSO4 intermediate

nodes.label: Taganito
nodes.notes: Surigao del Norte; SMM + Nickel Asia

nodes.label: Rincon Li
nodes.notes: Rio Tinto; Li brine; Puna highlands; Phase 1 3kt/yr

nodes.label: Robin Zeng
nodes.notes: CATL founder & Chairman; controls 18% stake; leads global battery expansion

nodes.label: JB Straubel
nodes.notes: Tesla co-founder & CTO; founded Redwood Materials 2017; battery recycling pioneer

nodes.label: Robert Friedland
nodes.notes: Ivanhoe Mines founder; discovered Kamoa-Kakula; also I-Pulse

nodes.label: Manuel 'Manny' Zamora
nodes.notes: FNI patriarch; Gutierrez-Zamora family controls Global Ferronickel

nodes.label: Jiang Weiping
nodes.notes: Tsingshan founder & Chairman; pioneer of NPI & HPAL in Indonesia

nodes.label: Yuan Jiabin
nodes.notes: CMOC Chairman; led Tenke Fungurume acquisition 2016; DRC cobalt dominant

nodes.label: Gary Nagle
nodes.notes: Glencore CEO since 2021; Viterra merger; DRC cobalt quota negotiations

nodes.label: Li Liangbin
nodes.notes: Tianqi Lithium founder; Greenbushes + SQM stake; exits SQM 2026

nodes.label: Dante Bravo
nodes.notes: FNI President & CEO; leads FNI surge on Indonesia quota tightening

nodes.label: FORGE
nodes.notes: US-led; 55 nations; replaces MSP; price floors vs China; Korea chairs until Jun 2026

nodes.label: US DoD
nodes.notes: $400M MP Materials deal Jul 2025; critical minerals defense supply chain; DPA Title III

nodes.label: US DoE
nodes.notes: Loan programs for REE processing; Idaho National Lab REE separation R&D

nodes.label: DRC ARECOMS
nodes.notes: 96,600t annual cobalt cap 2026; CMOC 6,650t/qtr, Glencore 3,925t/qtr; resumed Dec 2025

nodes.label: EU CRMA
nodes.notes: EU Critical Raw Materials Act 2024; 10% extraction, 40% processing, 15% recycling by 2030

nodes.label: MOFCOM China
nodes.notes: China Ministry of Commerce; entity list Jun 2026 targets MP Materials & USA Rare Earth

nodes.label: FIRB Australia
nodes.notes: Foreign Investment Review Board; blocks Chinese acquisition of AU critical mineral assets

nodes.label: DENR/MGB Philippines
nodes.notes: Dept of Environment & Natural Resources / Mines & Geosciences Bureau; Philippine mining permits
